perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two women are seated at a dining table; the woman on the left holds a large red bag of Kirkland Wild Argentine Red Shrimp while the woman on the right, wearing a zebra-patterned bucket hat, eats from a turquoise bowl. (2) They present two different Kirkland shrimp bags (red and blue) to the camera for a side-by-side comparison. (3) The scene shifts to a close-up of a frying pan where several pink shrimps are being sautéed with whole garlic cloves. (4) The video returns to the two women who continue to discuss the product, using hand gestures to emphasize the texture and size of the shrimp.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, medium-tempo electronic background music starts immediately. A female voice speaks in an energetic and friendly tone, introducing a new product from Costco. (2) The sound of sizzling oil and frying is heard as the visuals switch to the cooking demo. (3) The primary female narrator continues her detailed commentary, comparing the price and taste of two types of shrimp, with occasional agreement or short interjections from the second female.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: A large 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo is fixed at the top of the frame. (2) Hook Text: '野生阿根廷特大紅蝦仁' (Wild Argentine Jumbo Red Shrimp) appears in large yellow font. (3) Decorative/Effect Text: '超夯蝦仁買哪個?' (Which popular shrimp to buy?) and price indicators like '貴了300塊' (300 dollars more expensive). (4) Functional Text: Comprehensive Traditional Chinese subtitles track the spoken dialogue throughout the video.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Product Intro -> Comparison -> Cooking Demo -> Tasting/Verdict

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators seated at a table.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Two young women; one has long dark hair and a black top, the other wears a zebra-print bucket hat and a white and grey top.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A home interior with a dining table, a kitchen counter with a stove, and domestic lighting.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: This video serves as a consumer review and comparison guide for Costco members. The creators evaluate two different types of Kirkland frozen shrimp, comparing the 'Wild Argentine Red Shrimp' against the standard farm-raised version based on price-to-weight ratio, ease of preparation (tail-off vs tail-on), and taste/texture after cooking to provide a purchasing recommendation.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video features specific brand packaging and discusses price points and product availability at a specific retailer.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Permanent Costco Wholesale header and variety-show style large text overlays.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video uses typical Taiwanese social media editing styles, including high-density text and fast-paced conversational Mandarin with Hokkien particles.
